name: Neon Barricade: Zombie Survival
core_loop: Move with a virtual joystick, auto-fire at incoming enemies, collect drops, and choose upgrades every 45 seconds while surviving escalating waves.

name: BowlingBattle
core_loop: Observe a 5x9 lane board, wait for the conveyor to serve the current bowling ball, tap one of five rows to drop it, bounce or blast through advancing enemies, chain clears, and survive each handcrafted wave set.
